hero.name: Gregor Krykon
hero.title: Automation Engineer · Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I automate the tedious, build the essential — and ship things that keep running.

about.heading: About Me
about.body1: I'm Gregor — a developer based in Bavaria who got hooked on building things at 15 and never stopped.
about.body2: I started with game development, moved into web shops, and eventually found my groove in automation and full-stack development. Today I work at FELLOWPRO AG in software development, specialising in CI/CD, test automation, and DevOps — while running my own projects and self-hosted infrastructure in my spare time.
about.body3: My approach: ship something that works, then make it solid. No endless planning, no perfectionism paralysis — just consistent, tested, real output.
about.body4: If you need a website, an app, or a system that takes the manual work off your plate — let's talk.

krimispiele.title: krimispiele.com
krimispiele.desc: Shopware setup, customisation, and ongoing management for Samhain Verlag.

samhain.title: samhain-verlag.de
samhain.desc: WordPress site setup and content management for Samhain Verlag.

krimidinnerverzeichnis.title: krimidinnerverzeichnis.de
krimidinnerverzeichnis.desc: Database-driven comparison platform for crime games across Germany and Austria. Built with HTML & JavaScript. Developed for Lympselon – Krimi Events.

soenke.quote: What I especially appreciate about working with Gregor: he turns ideas into reality right away instead of debating them endlessly. Very quickly you get a working tool or site that is then refined and optimised together.
soenke.name: Sönke, Lympselon

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Reach out — I'd love to hear from you.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.heading: Legal Notice
impressum.subheading: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)
impressum.name: Gregor Krykon
impressum.liability_text: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 (1) DDG under general law. According to §§ 8 to 10 DDG, however, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
impressum.dispute_text: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
impressum.dispute_note: We are not willing or obligated to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
